meaning: adj.司法的,司法权的,审判权的,管辖权的
examples: Singapore and South Korea both recently relaxed restrictions on multi-jurisdictional work.
Governance has jurisdictional boundaries with programs as well as at the enterprise level.
Environmental permitting is inefficient, rife with redundancy, agency overlap, and jurisdictional issues.
We noted that it is in everyone's interest to avoid time consuming jurisdictional challenges.
Since the cloud is borderless, jurisdictional-based privacy laws are often a mismatch when applied to clouds.
